description: The CEO wants the 'Visits Over Time' graph for the 'Initial Site' to be visible on the internal corporate dashboard. Since employees viewing the intranet won't be logged into Matomo (admin / Admin12345), the widget must include an authentication token (token_auth) to load correctly. Generate the HTML embed code (the <iframe> tag) for the 'Visits Over Time' widget from the 'Visits Summary' category for the 'Initial Site'. Ensure the authentication token is included in the code and save the output to /home/ga/intranet_widget_code.html.
